sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96043" key="spondh/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδ-ήσιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for a drink-offering</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σοὶ φέρω σπονδήσιμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπονδὴν ἅμα</foreign> cj. Mein.).</sense> </entryFree>
